SEARCH
Package Cataphract.API.Minotaur

Class PolicyManager

java.lang.Object
Cataphract.API.Minotaur.PolicyManager
public class PolicyManager extends Object
A class implementing policy management system.
Since:
0.2.4.6 (Mosaic)
Version:
2.0.1 (11-October-2023, Cataphract)
Author:
DAK404 (https://github.com/DAK404)

    Field
    Description

    _userIsAdmin
    Stores the value if the user is an administrator or not.

    console
    Instantiate Console to get user inputs

    policyFileName
    Stores the path of the policy file.

    props
    Instantiate Properties to load and write to the policy file.
    final String[]

    Stores the default Cataphract values in an array.
    private String
    suggestedInputs
    Provide a set of applicable commands to the users.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    private final boolean
    authenticationLogic()
    Logic to authenticate a user to access the policy management system
    private final void
    displaySettings()
    Display the details of the policy file and the policies itself.
    private final void
    policyEditor()
    Logic containing the implementation to edit policies.
    final void
    policyEditorLogic()
    Logic to edit the policy file with the policy name and its corresponding values.
    private final void
    resetPolicyFile()
    Resets all the policies to its default values.
    private final void
    savePolicy(String policyName, String policyValue)
    Saves a policy to the file, with the key and value structure The policies are stored in an XML structured file
    private final void
    viewPolicyInfo()
    Display the policies and the required data.

  • Field Details

    • _userIsAdmin

      private boolean _userIsAdmin
      Stores the value if the user is an administrator or not.

    • resetValues

      public final String[] resetValues
      Stores the default Cataphract values in an array.

    • policyFileName

      private final String policyFileName
      Stores the path of the policy file.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • suggestedInputs

      private String suggestedInputs
      Provide a set of applicable commands to the users.

    • console

      private Console console
      Instantiate Console to get user inputs

    • props

      private Properties props
      Instantiate Properties to load and write to the policy file.

  • Constructor Details

    • PolicyManager

      public PolicyManager()
      Sole constructor. Checks if the policy file exists. Will reset if the file does not exist.

  • Method Details

    • policyEditorLogic

      public final void policyEditorLogic() throws Exception
      Logic to edit the policy file with the policy name and its corresponding values.
      Throws:
      Exception - Throws any exceptions encountered during runtime.

    • authenticationLogic

      private final boolean authenticationLogic()
      Logic to authenticate a user to access the policy management system
      Returns:
      boolean Returns the Authentication status.

    • policyEditor

      private final void policyEditor() throws Exception
      Logic containing the implementation to edit policies.
      Throws:
      Exception - Throws any exceptions encountered during runtime.

    • viewPolicyInfo

      private final void viewPolicyInfo() throws Exception
      Display the policies and the required data.
      Throws:
      Exception - Throws any exceptions encountered during runtime.

    • displaySettings

      private final void displaySettings() throws Exception
      Display the details of the policy file and the policies itself.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • savePolicy

      private final void savePolicy(String policyName, String policyValue) throws Exception
      Saves a policy to the file, with the key and value structure The policies are stored in an XML structured file
      Parameters:
      policyName - Name of the policy that needs to be stored.
      policyValue - Value of the policy that needs to be stored.
      Throws:
      Exception - Throws any exceptions encountered during runtime.

    • resetPolicyFile

      private final void resetPolicyFile() throws Exception
      Resets all the policies to its default values.
      Throws:
      Exception - Throws any exceptions encountered during runtime.
